other_observers: As of noon, I was the only observer.; I found this one.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch in the treed area that makes up their banding station.
description: Spotted thrush with extensive rufous dorsally. The dark eye was surrounded by a broad white eyering. The auricular seemed streaked with dark. The crown, nape, back, tail, and wings were bright rufous. The legs were pinkish. The white ventral side was boldly spotted with black.Behaviors: Skulking on the ground and once on a log in the darkest shadows mostly. Flew once low and out of site in forest of Russian olives.Call: none heardPlumage: unknown
